creator: vouzas@gmail.com
text:
Downloading 6.1 iso images for i386 from various ftp points succcesfull. 
Burning boot iso images succesfull
Burning Disk1 and Disk2 iso images fails around the 90% mark?

What should I do as I have gone through 15 cd attempts. I have tried low spped burning at 200kb/sec and still have problems. Most simulation attempts also fail. If they are succesfull they fail on the actual burning. 

I have no problems burning other files. Are the 386 FreeBSD 6.1 iso images error free?

kind regards,

Peter
